name: 奧術工藝
description: 魔法工藝、紫金色調、奧術符文與手作器物。

prompt.subject_template: A single standalone game item sprite of {{subject}}.
prompt.base: Centered isolated object, full object visible, readable silhouette, chunky 16-bit pixel art, crisp dark outline, hard pixel-art edges, strict 8-color low-color pixel art.
prompt.style: Arcane craft fantasy asset, mystical handmade shape language, rune, crystal, brass, parchment, wax, potion, glyph, or enchanted tool materials only when they are part of the requested object.
prompt.composition: Compact game icon composition, the requested object is the only focal element, no floating detached runes, sparkles, scrolls, crystals, or background props outside the main silhouette.
prompt.containment: The entire subject must fit fully inside the canvas, leave solid magenta margin on all four sides, no glyph, spark, aura, smoke, tassel, crystal shard, or decoration may touch or cross the canvas edge.
prompt.palette: Use exactly the arcane craft 8-color family: near-black outline, deep violet shadow, royal purple, bright arcane violet, muted lavender, dark brass, gold highlight, cyan magic accent.
prompt.background: Background is 100% solid flat magenta (#FF00FF), no gradients, no shadow under the object, no scenery, no pattern, magenta background only.
prompt.quality: Elegant silhouette, clear magical focal point attached to the object, readable small icon, crisp pixel clusters, compressed tones using one shadow, one midtone, and one highlight family.
prompt.forbidden: NO text, NO labels, NO words, NO letters, NO UI, NO speech bubbles, NO background items, NO extra loose materials.
